name: VictoriaMetrics Anomaly Detection MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for VictoriaMetrics anomaly detection (vmanomaly) — the ML-powered anomaly detection component for VictoriaMetrics time-series database. Enables AI agents to query anomaly scores, configure detection models, and integrate ML-based anomaly detection into operations monitoring workflows.
use_cases: Querying vmanomaly for detected anomalies in infrastructure metrics from SRE agents
Configuring anomaly detection models for specific metric patterns via DevOps agents
Integrating ML-based anomaly scores into AI-driven alert correlation workflows
Analyzing time-series anomalies across VictoriaMetrics monitored systems
not_for: Teams not using VictoriaMetrics (Prometheus, Datadog users need different tools)
Real-time streaming anomaly detection (vmanomaly processes in batch intervals)
Environments without vmanomaly deployed and configured
best_when: A VictoriaMetrics user with vmanomaly deployed wants AI agents to query anomaly detection results, configure models, and integrate ML-detected anomalies into operations workflows.
avoid_when: You use Prometheus without VictoriaMetrics, or use Datadog/Dynatrace for anomaly detection. Requires vmanomaly enterprise component.

auth.notes: VictoriaMetrics Enterprise features may require bearer token. Community VictoriaMetrics can have no auth or basic auth via proxy.

pricing.free_tier_limits: VictoriaMetrics open source is free; vmanomaly requires Enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: VictoriaMetrics Enterprise for vmanomaly and advanced features
pricing.notes: VictoriaMetrics Community is free open source. vmanomaly requires Enterprise license. Community org MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: No explicit rate limits — bounded by VictoriaMetrics instance performance

known_agent_gotchas: vmanomaly requires VictoriaMetrics Enterprise license — not available in free Community edition
Anomaly detection models need training data period before producing useful scores
Community org MCP server — may lag behind VictoriaMetrics Enterprise API changes
VictoriaMetrics MetricsQL query language needed for accessing anomaly metric streams
agent_readiness.security_notes: Infrastructure monitoring data is sensitive. Auth depends on VictoriaMetrics configuration. TLS recommended for remote access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Infrastructure data sensitive. Enterprise auth. TLS for remote deployment.
